## HST11

(Steel WW; Titanium - India)

29

![Image](data:image/png;base64,)

![Image](data:image/png;base64,)

hi-shear corporation

2600 SKYPARK DRIVE, TORRANCE, CALIFORNIA 90509 U.S.A.

## GENERAL NOTES:

- 1  Head edge out of roundness shall not exceed "F".

MATERIAL:

6AL-4V titanium alloy per AMS4928 or AMS4967.

HEAT TREAT: 90,000 psi shear minimum for 7/8 and larger). 160,000 psi tensile minimum (95,000 psi shear minimum for sizes up to 3/4;

![Image](data:image/png;base64,)

First dash number indicates nominal diameter in 1/32nds. Second dash number indicates maximum grip in 1/16ths. See Finish note for explanation of code letters. CODE:

SPECIFICATION:

HI-LITE™ Product Specification 380.
